note: Live connectivity tested in offline/stub mode. Connectors implement graceful fallback. Real Qdrant/Neo4j connectivity requires live service configuration.

checks.detail: QdrantConnector gracefully returns empty list when server unavailable. Collection name: domain_knowledge.
QdrantConnector gracefully returns empty list when server unavailable. Collection name: compatibility_rules.
Neo4jConnector gracefully returns empty list when server unavailable.
All 5 retrieval methods return correct types in offline mode.
All 7 retrieval methods return correct types in offline mode.
Collects from all three layers using provided query plans.
End-to-end pipeline returns EvidencePackage with graph, ranked evidence, and metadata.
Accepts both str and dict inputs; returns serialisable EvidencePackage.

connectivity_matrix.Layer1_Qdrant_domain_knowledge: OFFLINE_STUB — configure QdrantConnector(host, port) for live connection
connectivity_matrix.Layer2_Neo4j_inventory: OFFLINE_STUB — configure Neo4jConnector(uri, user, password) for live connection
connectivity_matrix.Layer3_Qdrant_compatibility_rules: OFFLINE_STUB — configure QdrantConnector(host, port) for live connection

live_connection_guide.Qdrant: Set QDRANT_HOST and QDRANT_PORT env vars. Pass QdrantConnector(host=host, port=port) to QdrantRetriever.
live_connection_guide.Neo4j: Set NEO4J_URI, NEO4J_USER, NEO4J_PASSWORD env vars. Pass Neo4jConnector(uri, user, password) to Neo4jRetriever.
